#  Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security (FAIX) 
The establishment of the Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security (FAIX) marks a significant milestone for Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka (UTeM) as it steps boldly into the forefront of education and research within Malaysia's Technical University Network (MTUN) and on a national scale. Officially founded on July 22, 2024, FAIX embodies UTeM’s proactive approach to addressing the evolving demands of technology and higher education, all while aligning with the vision and aspirations set forth by the Ministry of Higher Education.
Under the esteemed leadership of Vice-Chancellor, Professor Datuk Ts Dr. Massila Kamalrudin, UTeM is committed to becoming a primary driver in producing a workforce equipped with the necessary skills to meet the country’s ambitious goal of cultivating 200,000 AI specialists and 100,000 cyber security experts by 2030. This endeavor underscores Malaysia's aspiration to emerge as a regional technology leader, capable of competing within the global digital landscape.
FAIX is strategically designed to combine the core elements of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security, which are not only relevant but critical to modern society and industries worldwide.
[ Read More ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/faix/about-us/faculty-at-glance.html)

#  Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security (FAIX) 
The establishment of the Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security (FAIX) marks a significant milestone for Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka (UTeM) as it steps boldly into the forefront of education and research within Malaysia's Technical University Network (MTUN) and on a national scale. Officially founded on July 22, 2024, FAIX embodies UTeM’s proactive approach to addressing the evolving demands of technology and higher education, all while aligning with the vision and aspirations set forth by the Ministry of Higher Education.
Under the esteemed leadership of Vice-Chancellor, Professor Datuk Ts Dr. Massila Kamalrudin, UTeM is committed to becoming a primary driver in producing a workforce equipped with the necessary skills to meet the country’s ambitious goal of cultivating 200,000 AI specialists and 100,000 cyber security experts by 2030. This endeavor underscores Malaysia's aspiration to emerge as a regional technology leader, capable of competing within the global digital landscape.
FAIX is strategically designed to combine the core elements of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security, which are not only relevant but critical to modern society and industries worldwide.
[ Read More ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/faix/about-us/faculty-at-glance.html)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/7c/muhammad-hafidz-fazli-7cb1527f.png)

#  **Master By Course Work**
#  **Master of Technology (Data Science and Analytics)**
MQA/FA9613
This programme is specifically designed to equip students with the core and utilization of knowledge, technical skills, and the latest technology in the field of Data Science and Analytics.
###  Coursework List 
  * Research Methodology
  * Entreprenuership
  * Fundamental of Data Science
  * Big Data Management
  * Applied Statistical Methods
  * Applied Machine Learning
  * Big Data Analytics & Visualization
  * Modelling & Decision Making
  * Project 1
  * Project 2


###  Electives [Choose 2]: 
  * Special Topics in Applied Data Science
  * Manufacturing Analytics
  * Social Media Analytics
  * Geospatial Analytics
  * Healthcare Analytics
  * Tourism Analytics
  * Customer & Financial Analytics


###  Duration 
  * Full time 
    * Minimum: 1 year, Maximum: 3 years
  * Part time 
    * Minimum: 2 years, Maximum: 4 years


###  Fees 
  * Citizen: RM 11,910.00
  * Non-Citizen: RM 30, 465.00


_*Fees for the minimum period of study_
##  [We look forward to receiving your application.](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/academics/postgraduate-programmes/master-of-technology-data-science-and-analytics.html)
[ SPS Website ](https://sps.utem.edu.my/)
[ Online Application ](https://portal.utem.edu.my/admission/)
#  Contact Information

Melaka, Malaysia.
+606 270 2791/ +606 270 1952/ +606 270 1933/ +606 270 2788

#  **Master By Course Work**
#  **Master of Computer Science (Security Science)**
MQA/FA5653
This programme is specifically designed to equip students with security elements in information and communication technology related to management, data and infrastructure
###  Coursework List 
  * University Course**
  * Research Methodology
  * Advanced Data Communications & Network
  * Algorithm Analysis & Design
  * Cryptography & Data Security
  * Security Management
  * Practices
  * Cyber Threat Intelligence
  * Systems & Network Ethical Hacking
  * Project 1
  * Project 2


###  Electives [Choose 2]: 
  * Intrusion Detection & Prevention
  * Computer Forensics
  * Public Key Infrastructure
  * Watermarking
  * Security Audit & Assessment
  * Secure Software Design & Development


###  Duration 
  * Full time 
    * Minimum: 1 year, Maximum: 3 years
  * Part time 
    * Minimum: 2 years, Maximum: 4 years


###  Fees 
  * Citizen: RM 8,710.00
  * Non-Citizen: RM22, 065.00


_*Fees for the minimum period of study_
##  [We look forward to receiving your application.](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/academics/postgraduate-programmes/master-of-computer-science-security-science.html)
[ SPS Website ](https://sps.utem.edu.my/)
[ Online Application ](https://portal.utem.edu.my/admission/)

#  **Master By Course Work**
#  **Master Of Technology In Data Science And Analytics (With Open And Distance Learning - ODL)**
(MQA/PA 17473)
This programme is designed for recent graduates and industry practitioners with strong analytical and computing skills. It provides foundational and applied knowledge, equipping students with the ability to analyse big data, use advanced data science tools, and apply analytics techniques across various domains.
The ODL mode offers flexible, self-paced learning, making it ideal for working professionals. Through university-industry collaboration, the programme emphasizes state-of-the-art technologies and methodologies. Graduate will be prepared for careers such as data scientists, data analysts, and other roles in the growing field of data science.
###  Coursework List 
  * Research Methodology
  * Entreprenuership
  * Fundamental of Data Science
  * Big Data Management
  * Applied Statistical Methods
  * Applied Machine Learning
  * Big Data Analytics & Visualization
  * Modelling & Decision Making
  * Project 1
  * Project 2


###  Electives [Choose 2]: 
  * Manufacturing Analytics
  * Social Media Analytics
  * Healthcare Analytics
  * Customer & Financial Analytics


###  Duration 
  * Full time 
    * Minimum: 1 year, Maximum: 6 years
  * Part time 
    * Minimum: 2 years, Maximum: 6 years


###  Fees 
Full time
  * Citizen: RM 25,110.00
  * Non-Citizen: RM43, 410.00


Part time
  * Citizen: RM RM25,730.00
  * Non-Citizen: RM44, 030.00


_*Fees for the minimum period of study_
##  [We look forward to receiving your application.](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/academics/postgraduate-programmes/master-of-technology-in-data-science-and-analytics-with-open-and-distance-learning-odl.html)
[ SPS Website ](https://sps.utem.edu.my/)
[ Online Application ](https://portal.utem.edu.my/admission/)

#  **Professional Certification Courses**
Professional certification courses are designed to enable undergraduate students to obtain professional certificates or, at the very least, prepare them for professional certification. These professional certificates add value and enhance graduates’ employability.
Currently, the professional certificates available for the undergraduate program are as follows:
#  **Digital Forensic First Responder Professional Certificate**
However, the Faculty will continue to strive to provide relevant certificates that are in high demand across most industries.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/53/photo-1537498425277-c283d32ef9db-5342ae59.jpeg)

#  **Undergraduate Programme currently offered**
#  **Bachelor of Computer Science**  
**(Artificial Intelligence) with Honours - BAXI**
MQA/FA1888
**Bachelor of Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence) with Honours** , BAXI, academic programme is offered to prepare graduates with a thorough understanding and superior skills of Computer Science, particularly in the area of Artificial Intelligence. Graduates will also be equipped with advanced scientific knowledge and engineering skills in Artificial Intelligence (AI) to fulfil industry needs, especially in the field of information and communication technology (ICT), robotics and manufacturing.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/90/baxi-90c63dd5.jpeg)
##  Career Prospects 
Extensive career opportunities in computer science and information technology are open to graduates who specialize in artificial intelligence. Graduates who specialize in artificial intelligence can also pursue their post-graduate studies. Among the career opportunities are knowledge engineers, smart systems or expert system developers, system analysts, system programmers, system designers, software developers, software consultants, computer scientists, and researchers.
##  **Programme Learning Outcomes (PLO)**
* * *
Upon completion of the programme, graduates should be able to:
  1. Analyse computing problems using computer science knowledge.
  2. Apply appropriate computer science solutions for artificial intelligence problems.
  3. Construct solutions using appropriate computing methods for complex problems.
  4. Demonstrate social skills and responsibilities in engaging with society, community and stakeholders.
  5. Exhibit effective communication through oral and written modes in engaging with society, community and stakeholders.
  6. Deploy a broad range of software or tools to solve industry computing problems.
  7. Apply numeracy skills to solve computing problems.
  8. Demonstrate leadership characteristics and contribute independently as individual or member in a team to solve computing problems.
  9. Demonstrate capabilities in information management, lifelong learning and independent study.
  10. Utilise an entrepreneurial mindset in delivering solutions.
  11. Uphold professionalism, attitudes and ethical values in workplace.


[ Undergraduate Programmes ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/academics/undergraduate-programmes.html)

#  **Undergraduate Programme currently offered**
# 
**Bachelor of Computer Science  
****(Computer Security) with Honours -****BAXZ**
MBOT/PR/IT/0/02/0072
A bachelor’s degree course in **Computer Science (Computer Security) with Honours** is aimed to produce highly knowledgeable and skillful graduates in the field of security related to computer science and information technology. Graduates are competent in advanced specialized knowledge and skill to analyze, design, install, configure, implement, administer, maintain and monitor the security infrastructure.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/8c/baxz-8c6603f9.jpeg)
##  Career Prospects 
The graduates can be employed in the government and private sectors as well as undertaking business ventures of their own. The positions suitable for the graduates including Information Technology Executive, System Analyst, Network Security Manager/Administrator, System Security Manager/Administrator, IT Project Manager, Network Security Engineer, Network Security Executive, System/Network Security Consultant, Researcher.
##  **Learning Outcomes**
* * *
The aim of FAIX’s **Bachelor of Computer Science (Computer Security) with Honours** degree program is to produce students with the following characteristics:
  * Able to apply knowledge of computer science and information technology.
  * Able to analyze, design and develop ICT applications.
  * Able to analyze, create, assemble, configure, implement, manage, maintain and administer network infrastructure and security.
  * Able to analyze and design the physical and cybersecurity policy.
  * Able to obtain recognition from professional bodies.
  * Able to resolve problems in creative way and able to communicate effectively.
  * Able to contribute individually or in a team in various disciplines and domains.
  * Able to lead with ethics and have Entrepreneurship skills.
  * Able to perform continuous self-learning to obtain knowledge and skills.


[ Undergraduate Programmes ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/academics/undergraduate-programmes.html)

#  **Shaping the Future with**
#  **AI and Cybersecurity Education at FAIX**
At FAIX, we are developing the next generation of technologists through an innovative, hands-on approach to education. As a faculty specializing in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Cybersecurity, our academic programmes integrate Technical and Vocational Education and Training (TVET) with the recent industry knowledge, ensuring students gain both theoretical expertise and real-world skills.
Our curriculum is designed to keep up with the ever-evolving technology landscape, equipping students with future-ready competencies that meet industry demands. Through immersive coursework and hands-on labs, students engage in practical learning experiences that bridge the gap between academia and professional practice.
By choosing FAIX, you are not just earning a qualification, but you are also embarking on a transformative journey that prepares you to lead in AI and cybersecurity. Join us in shaping a future where innovation and expertise drive progress.
Discover the possibilities at the University by undertaking a Bachelor or Diploma over 3 or 4 years.
#  Undergraduate Programme currently offered 
[ ![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/7e/photo-1537498425277-c283d32ef9db-7e2a7190.jpeg) Bachelor of Computer Science (Computer Security) with Honours  Read more ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/academics/undergraduate-programmes/bachelor-of-computer-science-computer-security.html)
[ ![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/af/photo-1718241905696-cb34c2c07bed-af189d29.jpeg) Bachelor of Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence) with Honours  Read more ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/academics/undergraduate-programmes/bachelor-of-computer-science-ai.html)
#  **Upcoming New Programmes**
  1. Diploma in Applied Artificial Intelligence
  2. Bachelor in Applied Artificial Intelligence with Honours
  3. Bachelor in Data Science with Business Analytics (Honours)


#  **Contact Us**
Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security  
Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka  
Hang Tuah Jaya, 76100 Durian Tunggal  
Melaka, Malaysia

#  **"Elevate your expertise, shape the future—pursue your master's with us"**
#  **Master Degree by Coursework**
  1. **Master of Computer Science (Security Science)**
  2. **Master of Technology (Data Science and Analytics)**
  3. **Master of Technology in Data Science and Analytics (with Open And Distance Learning - ODL)**


This programme is designed to advance the knowledge and skills in order to develop new professional skills among graduates in the particular area of study.
###  Admission Requirements for Master of Computer Science/Master of Technology: 
  1. A Bachelor’s degree (Level 6, MQF) in Computing or related fields with a minimum CGPA of 2.50, as accepted by the HEP Senate;


OR
  1. A Bachelor’s degree (Level 6, MQF) in Computing or related fields with a minimum CGPA of 2.00 and not meeting a CGPA of 2.50 can be accepted subject to a thorough rigorous assessment as determined by the HEP;


OR
  1. A Bachelor’s degree (Level 6, MQF) in a Non-Computing field with a minimum CGPA of 2.00 can be accepted subject to a thorough rigorous assessment as determined by the HEP to identify the appropriate prerequisite courses that are equivalent to their working experience in the Computing or related fields;


OR
  1. A Bachelor’s degree (Level 6, MQF) in a Non-Computing field with a minimum CGPA of 2.00 can be accepted subject to appropriate prerequisite courses;


OR
  1. Other qualifications equivalent to a Bachelor’s degree (Level 6, MQF) in Computing or related fields recognised by the Government of Malaysia must fulfil the requirement on item i or ii.


###  English Requirement (for International Applicant): 
Achieve a minimum of Band 4 in MUET or equivalent to CEFR (Low B2). If students do not meet this requirement, they must enroll in English proficiency courses offered by the HEP to ensure their language skills are sufficient to meet the programme's needs.
> ## "Gain a competitive edge with our distinguished faculty, guiding you towards academic excellence."
##  [We look forward to receiving your application.](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/admission/postgraduate.html)
[ School of Graduate Studies ](https://sps.utem.edu.my/)
[ Online Application ](https://portal.utem.edu.my/admission/)
#  Contact Information 
For more information, please do not hesitate to contact us at:
Mdm. Nur Azriah Binti Amir  
azriah@utem.edu.my
Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security,  
Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka,  
Hang Tuah Jaya, 76100 Durian Tunggal,  
Melaka

#  **Admission**
#  **AI and Cybersecurity Education at FAIX**
Welcome to the Faculty of Artificial Intelligence & Cyber Security (FAIX), where innovation and hands-on experience converge to forge the next generation of global technology leaders. Our dynamic programs emphasize practical learning, with 70% of your education devoted to coursework and immersive, real-world projects. This approach ensures you master both theoretical fundamentals and the practical skills demanded by today's fast-paced industries.
Our curriculum is thoughtfully designed to stay ahead of the rapidly evolving tech landscape, particularly in AI and cyber security. By continuously updating our courses to reflect the latest industry trends and breakthroughs, we prepare our students to be agile, innovative, and industry-ready.
**We proudly invite international students to join our vibrant, diverse community. At FAIX, you'll embark on a transformative learning journey where academic excellence meets real-world application—equipping you to lead and succeed on the global stage.**
**List of Programmes**
Explore our undergraduate programs and courses at our University. Unlock endless possibilities by pursuing a Diploma and Bachelor's degree through our flexible 3 or 4 year programs, and set the foundation for a successful future.
#  **Bachelor of Computer Science**  
**(Computer Security)**
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/53/photo-1537498425277-c283d32ef9db-5342ae59.jpeg)
##  Program Overview 
Our Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science (Computer Security) (Honours) is designed to produce highly skilled professionals in IT security. The program equips students with advanced theoretical knowledge and practical expertise to analyze, design, install, configure, implement, administer, maintain, and monitor secure computing infrastructures.
* * *
##  Career Prospects 
Graduates are well-prepared for roles in both the public and private sectors, or even entrepreneurial ventures. Career opportunities include positions such as:
  * Information Technology Executive
  * Systems Analyst
  * Security Analyst
  * Network/Security Manager or Administrator
  * IT Project Manager
  * Network Security Engineer/Executive
  * Systems/Network Security Consultant
  * Researcher


* * *
##  Learning Outcomes 
The program aims to develop students who are able to:
  * Able to apply knowledge of computer science and information technology.
  * Able to analyze, design and develop ICT applications.
  * Able to analyze, create, assemble, configure, implement, manage, maintain and administer network infrastructure and security.
  * Able to analyze and design the physical and cybersecurity policy.
  * Able to obtain recognition from professional bodies.
  * Able to resolve problems in creative way and able to communicate effectively.
  * Able to contribute individually or in a team in various disciplines and domains.
  * Able to lead with ethics and have Entrepreneurship skills.
  * Able to perform continuous self-learning to obtain knowledge and skills.


#  **Bachelor of Computer Science  
(Artificial Intelligence)**
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/e9/photo-1718241905696-cb34c2c07bed-e97c41c5.jpeg)
##  Program Overview 
The Bachelor of Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence) program is designed to provide a comprehensive foundation in computer science, with a special focus on information and communication technology. Alongside robust theoretical knowledge, the curriculum integrates essential engineering principles and advanced AI skills, preparing graduates to meet industry demands in ICT, robotics, and manufacturing.
* * *
##  Career Prospects 
Graduates specializing in artificial intelligence enjoy extensive career opportunities across the computer science and information technology sectors. They are well-positioned for roles such as knowledge engineer, smart systems or expert system developer, systems analyst, systems programmer, systems designer, software developer, software consultant, computer scientist, and researcher. This program also serves as an excellent stepping stone for those interested in pursuing postgraduate studies.
* * *
##  Learning Outcomes 
FAIX’s Bachelor of Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence) program aims to develop graduates who are:
  * Able to acquire and apply knowledge in computer science and information technology.
  * Able to analyze, design and develop ICT applications.
  * Can use artificial intelligence techniques such as search techniques, fuzzy logic, neural networks, evolutionary computing, machine learning, and intelligent agents when developing a system.
  * Equipped with skills to develop systems individually or in groups based on artificial intelligence such as smart systems, expert systems, intelligent agent systems and robot systems.
  * Able to conduct research in related fields and based on artificial intelligence.
  * Able to think creatively and critically in problem solving and communicate effectively to convey ideas.
  * Able to contribute skills individually or as a group to different disciplines and domains.
  * Able to demonstrate good personal, ethical, leadership and entrepreneurial skills.
  * Able to carry out his own learning continuously to gain knowledge and skills.


##  [We look forward to receiving your application.](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/admission/undergraduate-international/list-of-programmes-international.html)
[ Entry Requirement ](https://www.utem.edu.my/en/downloads/admission/109-guideline-for-selection-and-offer-of-study-programmes-for-international-students-in-utem/file.html)

#  **Industry and Keynote Speakers**
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Fifacs%2Fspeaker_Danial.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22200%2C200%2C%2Ccenter%2Ctop%22%7D&hash=093ade2f)
### 
Mr. Danial Azizan
**Head of Country**  
**Google for Education**
####  **AI, Cybersecurity and the Connected Future: Opportunities for Academics, Researchers and Students**
Biography:  
Danial Azizan is a high performance sales, people and partner leader with more than a decade of sales, business development and Cloud advisory experience across multiple MNCs and industries. The first Bruneian full-time to join Microsoft Asia Pacific and Oracle, to lead Governments, enterprises and SMEs in creating an aspirational plan that formalizes their digital vision with Artificial Intelligence (AI) Cloud platforms and sustainability.
In his role today as the Country Director for Google for Education, he heads Education leadership for Malaysia and Brunei in advocating Google’s investments and partnerships in expanding access for teaching and learning, and arming the next generation of leaders with future-ready skills. In 2020, he was awarded as one of The Most Inspiring LinkedIn Icons in Brunei for his contributions in the areas of Digital Transformation and Leadership.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Fifacs%2Fspeaker_Zulkarnain.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22200%2C200%2C%2Ccenter%2Ctop%22%7D&hash=47d23afc)
### 
Mr. Zulkarnain Asnawi
Solution Consultant & Advisory  
Fortinet Malaysia  
in collaboration with Cyber Security Consortium
####  **Cybersecurity at the Core: Safeguarding Innovation in a Hyperconnected World**
Biography:  
Zulkarnain Asnawi, with more than than 25 years experience in the IT and cybersecurity domains across various vertical industries which include among other FSI, Government, Transportation Telecommunication and Oil & Gas. As a solution consultant and advisor, Zulkarnain has worked with and provide advisory services to many large enterprise executive teams to develop IT and Cybersecurity strategic plan taking into consideration business objectives, risk, compliance, operational processes, human capital and technology. Prior to joining Fortinet Malaysia, Zulkarnain has held leadership roles like senior technology consultant position, Head of IT Strategy and Governance and Head of Enterprise Architecture.
Zulkarnain is also well versed in the field of network connectivity, data center infrastructure and integration; allowing him to share broad perspectives in providing cybersecurity solutions and advisories.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/35/speaker_Dr.Quan-35ef7945.jpeg)
### 
Associate Professor Dr. Quan Guo
Guangxi Minzu University
####  Advancing Large Language Models for Low-Resource Languages: Bridging Global AI Innovation with Regional Needs 
Biography:  
Dr. Quan Guo (born 1987) is an Associate Researcher and Master’s Supervisor at the School of Artificial Intelligence, Guangxi Minzu University, and a recipient of the Bagui Young Top Talents Program. He also serves as Chair of the IEEE Chengdu Young Professionals Affinity Group and Council Member of the Artificial Intelligence Society of Sichuan Province. He earned his Ph.D. from Sichuan University under Prof. Yi Zhang and completed postdoctoral research on large language models at Michigan State University and Tulane University.
His research interests include AI, neural networks, intelligent medicine, and large language models for low-resource languages. Dr. Guo has published 30+ papers, received 800+ citations, and won awards including the MAIS 2019 AI Impact Award and Best Paper Awards from IEEE Chengdu Section and the Sichuan Computer Federation. He led the first deployment of Deepseek R1 in Guangxi and the Chinese–ASEAN Large Language Model Project.
[ Pre-recorded Session ](https://drive.google.com/file/d/1H950z33xTbIMa3CryBIN5BeESsjL6kZG/view?usp=sharing)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/d2/speaker_DrMarek-d23277e3.jpeg)
### 
Associate Professor Dr. Marek Bundzel
Department of Cybernetics and Artificial Intelligence  
Technical University of Košice (TUKE), Slovakia
####  Perceiving Reality: AI Object Detection Across Wild Terrain and Human Body 
Biography:  
Associate Professor Dr. Marek Bundzel, PhD. is active at Technical University in Košice, Slovakia, Department of Cybernetics and Artificial Intelligence. He has conducted research at several research institutions abroad for example Danish Hydroinformatics Institute, University of Pavia, Italy or Czech Technical University, Prague. He spent two years at Waseda University, Tokyo developing an implementation of a Hierarchical Temporal Memory model of brain function under a scholarship of Japan Society for Promotion of Science.
His research focuses on computer vision, mainly in biomedicine and archaeology. He was leading investigator and a researcher in several national and international projects, such as investigator in several international and national projects, such as Processing and analysis of ultrasonography video sequences using artificial intelligence methods, Adaptive rehabilitation and diagnostics platform or Searching for the lost Mayan city.
#  **Contact Us**
Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security  
Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka  
Hang Tuah Jaya, 76100 Durian Tunggal  
Melaka, Malaysia

#  **Admission**
#  **AI and Cybersecurity Education at FAIX**
Welcome to the Faculty of Artificial Intelligence & Cyber Security (FAIX), where innovation and hands-on experience converge to forge the next generation of global technology leaders. Our dynamic programs emphasize practical learning, with 70% of your education devoted to coursework and immersive, real-world projects. This approach ensures you master both theoretical fundamentals and the practical skills demanded by today's fast-paced industries.
Our curriculum is thoughtfully designed to stay ahead of the rapidly evolving tech landscape, particularly in AI and cyber security. By continuously updating our courses to reflect the latest industry trends and breakthroughs, we prepare our students to be agile, innovative, and industry-ready.
**We proudly invite international students to join our vibrant, diverse community. At FAIX, you'll embark on a transformative learning journey where academic excellence meets real-world application—equipping you to lead and succeed on the global stage.**
**List of Programmes**
Explore our undergraduate programs and courses at our University. Unlock endless possibilities by pursuing a Diploma and Bachelor's degree through our flexible 3 or 4 year programs, and set the foundation for a successful future.
# 
**Bachelor Programmes**
****(Starting Semester 1 -2025/2026)****
* * *
# 
  * Bachelor of Computer Science (Computer Security) with Honours – (MBOT/PR/IT/0/02/0072) 
  * Bachelor of Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence) with Honours – (MQA/FA 1888) 


# 
**Diploma Programme**
* * *
# 
  * Diploma in Artificial Intelligence ( Will be offered soon)

#  **Program Overview**
The **AI & CS Festival Program** aims to bring together strategic higher education partners, including stakeholders, academics, and researchers/scientists from both local and international institutions, to discuss advanced TVET issues focused on Artificial Intelligence (AI) and Cybersecurity (CS). This program is also to strengthen MTUN as a center of excellence in the fields of AI and CS and highlight MTUN in the production of high-tech solutions. This initiative will have a positive impact on MTUN’s position as a leader in the fields of AI and CS. It will also serve to introduce MTUN to industry players and the public in related fields.
# 
**Program Goals**
* * *
The organization of this program will directly contribute to strengthening strategic collaborations between MTUN and the Quadruple Helix sectors based on areas of expertise, expanding international strategic networks, and enhancing the branding and global positioning of both UTeM and MTUN.
Among the impactful activities planned throughout the program are discourse sessions through industry and academic keynote sessions, forum platforms, industry exhibitions, research and project showcases.
# 
**Program Objectives**
* * *
  * Strengthening MTUN’s position as a center of excellence in the fields of Artificial Intelligence(AI) and Cybersecurity (CS) through keynote sessions and forums.
  * Showcasing talent and high-technology innovations through Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security exhibitions.
  * Enhancing strategic collaboration between industry and academia in advancing AI and CS solutions.


#  **Industry and Keynote Speakers**
[ ![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Fifacs%2Fspeaker_Danial.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22525%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=14908b5c) Mr. Danial Azizan  Head of Country Google for Education ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/events/ifacs/information-ifacs.html)
[ ![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Fifacs%2Fspeaker_Zulkarnain.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22525%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=46ff4ed4) Mr. Zulkarnain Asnawi  Solution Consultant & Advisory Fortinet Malaysia in collaboration with Cyber Security Consortium ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/events/ifacs/information-ifacs.html)
[ ![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Fifacs%2Fspeaker_Dr.Quan.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22525%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=a78c3a6d) Associate Professor Dr. Quan Guo  Guangxi Minzu University ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/events/ifacs/information-ifacs.html)
[ ![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Fifacs%2Fspeaker_DrMarek.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22525%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=af127d63) Associate Professor Dr. Marek Bundzel  Department of Cybernetics and Artificial Intelligence Technical University of Košice (TUKE), Slovakia ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/events/ifacs/information-ifacs.html)

##  **Programme Schedule**
**8:30 am**
###  Arrival of Guest and Registration
* * *
**9:00 am**
###  Arrival of Vice Chancellor UTeM
* * *
**9:10 am**
###  Arrival of the Distinguished Guests
* * *
**9:15 am**
###  Arrival of the Chairman of the University Board of Directors  
  
Arrival of **YBhg. Tan Sri Abdul Rashid Hussain**  
**Pro Canselor UTeM**
* * *
**9:20 am**
###  Negaraku & UTeM Terbilang Anthem  
Prayer Recital
* * *
**9:30 am**
###  Welcoming Speech **by YBhg. Prof. Datuk Ts. Dr. Massila binti Kamalrudin**   
Vice Chancellor, Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka
* * *
**9:40 am**
###  Opening Remarks & Official Opening Ceremony  
**YBhg. Tan Sri Abdul Rashid Hussain**  
**Pro Canselor UTeM**
* * *
**9:50 am**
###  Montage and Video Presentation   
  
Group Photo Session
* * *
**10:00 am**
###  Break
* * *
**10:30 am - 11:45 am**
**Session 1: Industry Keynote**
###  “AI, Cybersecurity and the Connected Future: Opportunities for Academics, Researchers and Students”
**Mr Danial Azizan, Head of Country, Google for Education**
* * *
**11:50 am - 1:15 pm**
**Session 2: Industry Keynote**
###  Cyber Security Consortium  
**"Cybersecurity at the Core: Safeguarding Innovation in a Hyperconnected World"**
**Mr. Zulkarnain Asnawi, Fortinet Malaysia**
* * *
**1:15 pm**
###  Lunch and Networking
* * *
**2:30 pm - 3.30 pm**
**Session 3: Academic Forum**
###  “Artificial Intelligence and Cybersecurity: Global Challenges to be Frontiers in TVET Education"
**UTeM, UTHM, UNiMAP dan UMPSA**
* * *
**3:30 pm - 4.30 pm**
**Session 4: Academia Keynote**
###  **“Advancing Large Language Models for Low-Resource Languages: Bridging Global AI Innovation with Regional Needs”**
**Associate Professor Dr. Quan Guo,**  
**Guangxi Minzu University**
* * *
**4.30 pm**
###  Afternoon Tea  
Event ends
**_Dress Code: Lounge Suit / Corporate Attire / Office Wear_**

Melaka, Malaysia

#  **Energy Info**
_Article in Bahasa Melayu_
# 
**JAWATANKUASA HIJAU, PENJIMATAN DAN KELESTARIAN**
**FAKULTI KECERDASAN BUATAN DAN KESELAMATAN SIBER**
UTeM telah memulakan Sistem Pengurusan Tenaga (SPT) sejak tahun 2015 dengan penuh komitmen secara berterusan menerusi Polisi Tenaga UTeM. Pada tahun 2018 UTeM telah bersetuju berkaitan perubahan Polisi tenaga Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka (UTeM) kepada Dasar dan Garis Panduan Pengurusan Tenaga Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka (DGP Tenaga UTeM).
**Objektif Pengurusan Tenaga UTeM**
  * Untuk mengurangkan jejak karbon melalui pengurusan tenaga, air dan bahan api kenderaan yang cekap.
  * Untuk mengurangkan penggunaan tenaga sebanyak tiga (3) peratus setahun bagi setiap satu meter persegi ruang bangunan mulai tahun 2015.
  * Untuk mengurangkan penggunaan tenaga sebanyak lapan belas (18) peratus pada Tahun Fiskal 2020 bagi setiap satu meter persegi ruang bangunan (dengan menggunakan Tahun Fiskal 2014 sebagai asas)


**Pembudayaan UTeM Bangkit Bersama Cekap Tenaga:**
  * Padamkan lampu, kipas, aircond, komputer, projector dan lain-lain peranti elektrik jika tidak digunakan
  * Menutup pintu dan tingkap bagi ruang berhawa dingin
  * Set suhu penghawa dingin 24oC -26oC. 
  * Melaporkan kepada pihak pengurusan sekiranya terlihat ada pembaziran elektrik

### [ Deklarasi Komitmen UTeM  Read more ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/images/mix/Poster-Deklarasi-Pengurusan-Tenaga-2022_page-0001-1-724x1024.jpg)

#  **Faculty at Glance**
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/31/b1-31f977a4.jpeg)
##  Introduction to the Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security (FAIX) at Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka (UTeM) 
The establishment of the Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security (FAIX) marks a significant milestone for Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka (UTeM) as it steps boldly into the forefront of education and research within Malaysia's Technical University Network (MTUN) and on a national scale. Officially founded on July 22, 2024, FAIX embodies UTeM’s proactive approach to addressing the evolving demands of technology and higher education, all while aligning with the vision and aspirations set forth by the Ministry of Higher Education.
Under the esteemed leadership of Vice-Chancellor, Professor Datuk Ts Dr. Massila Kamalrudin, UTeM is committed to becoming a primary driver in producing a workforce equipped with the necessary skills to meet the country’s ambitious goal of cultivating 200,000 AI specialists and 100,000 cyber security experts by 2030. This endeavor underscores Malaysia's aspiration to emerge as a regional technology leader, capable of competing within the global digital landscape.
FAIX is strategically designed to combine the core elements of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security, which are not only relevant but critical to modern society and industries worldwide. By introducing this new faculty, UTeM aims to lead both the MTUN and the national education landscape, responding effectively to the current global demands for expertise in these two interrelated fields. The faculty reinforces UTeM's commitment to "Advanced Manufacturing and Computing Technology," integrating cutting-edge AI and cyber security advancements into its curriculum and research.
As a leading hub for AI and cyber security research, FAIX emphasizes integrated research methodologies to tackle contemporary industrial challenges. Our goal is to foster an innovative learning environment that inspires students and researchers alike to explore and develop solutions that have a tangible impact on society. The programs offered at FAIX are diversified and meticulously structured, ensuring that students gain comprehensive knowledge and practical skills essential for success in their careers.
In terms of academic offerings, FAIX provides a variety of programs tailored to meet industry needs, including:
  * **Bachelor of Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence) with Honours**
  * **Bachelor of Computer Science (Computer Security) with Honours**
  * **Master of Technology in Data Science and Analytics**
  * **Master of Technology in Data Science and Analytics (Open and Distance Learning - ODL)**
  * **Master of Computer Science (Security Science)**


![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/6d/academic_ftmk-6d5d6ab1.jpeg)
These programs are designed to ensure that students not only acquire theoretical knowledge but also engage in hands-on experiences that prepare them for the complexities and challenges of the industry. The curricula have been developed with significant input from industry experts, maintaining high standards of relevance and quality. Our aim is to produce graduates who are not only well-versed in the principles of AI and cyber security but are also equipped with the critical thinking and problem-solving skills necessary to innovate and excel in a rapidly changing technological landscape.
By June 2025, we anticipate welcoming our inaugural cohort of students, who will embark on an educational journey rich with opportunities for personal and professional growth. As we prepare to accept applications for the 2025/2026 academic year, we are eager to cultivate a diverse and dynamic community of learners who are passionate about shaping the future of technology.
FAIX is home to a dedicated team of 25 academic staff and 5 administrative personnel. Our faculty members bring a wealth of knowledge and expertise in their respective fields, ensuring that students receive top-quality education and mentorship throughout their academic endeavours. We are enthusiastic about fostering a collaborative environment where ideas can flourish, and innovation thrives.
In summary, the Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security at UTeM represents a bold commitment to advancing education, research, and the development of high-caliber professionals in AI and cyber security disciplines. With our strong emphasis on research, industry collaboration, and a curriculum designed for the future, FAIX is poised to be a leader in producing the next generation of tech-savvy individuals equipped to tackle global challenges. We invite you to join us on this exciting journey as we shape the future of technology together!
> _"Our faculty members bring a wealth of knowledge and expertise in their respective fields, ensuring that students receive top-quality education and mentorship throughout their academic endeavours. We are enthusiastic about fostering a collaborative environment where ideas can flourish, and innovation thrives"_
#  **Contact Us**
Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security  
Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka  
Hang Tuah Jaya, 76100 Durian Tunggal  
Melaka, Malaysia
  * faix@utem.edu.my
  * +606 229 2124


Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security (FAIX)

#  **Dean's Foreword**
Assalamualaikum warahmatullah wabarakatuh and greetings to all
Welcome to the Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security (FAIX) at Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka (UTeM).
Established in 2024, FAIX was founded to proactively meet the growing demand for expertise in artificial intelligence and cyber security. As a newly formed faculty, we are committed to becoming a leading center of excellence in education, research, and services, with a strong focus on creativity and innovation. Our mission is to nurture future-ready professionals equipped with the knowledge, technical expertise, and critical thinking skills needed to excel in the ever-evolving digital world.
Grounded in a strong academic foundation, FAIX offers a programs designed to develop core and applied skills in artificial intelligence, cyber security, and data science, ensuring graduates are well-prepared to meet industry demands. Our undergraduate offerings include:
  1. Bachelor of Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence) with Honours
  2. Bachelor of Computer Science (Computer Security) with Honours


At the postgraduate level, we provide advanced educational opportunities through our master’s programs, which include:
  1. Master of Technology in Data Science and Analytics
  2. Master of Technology in Data Science and Analytics (Open and Distance Learning - ODL)
  3. Master of Computer Science (Security Science)


These programs are designed to ensure that our students gain practical, application-oriented knowledge alongside theoretical foundations, preparing them for the challenges they will face in the workforce.
To our esteemed visitors, thank you for your interest in FAIX. I encourage you to explore our website, where you will find comprehensive information about our programs, research areas, professional and community services, and various activities undertaken by the faculty.
We hope this platform serves as a gateway to understanding how FAIX contributes to the advancement of artificial intelligence and cyber security in Malaysia and beyond.
Thank you for visiting, and we look forward to connecting with you.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/66/muhammad-hafidz-fazli-66fe5806.png)
Dean, Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security

#  **Vision**
To be a global leader in advancing Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security, empowering an intelligent, secure, and future-ready digital world.
#  **Mission**
# 
  1. Leading the development of competent talent in the fields of Artificial Intelligence and Cybersecurity to shape human capital and a secure, intelligent digital future.
  2. Pioneering Innovation in Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security through strategic collaboration.
  3. Advancing Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security solutions that are ethical, inclusive, industry-oriented and societal well-being.


#  **Objectives**
# 
  1. To produce graduates who are competent, globally competitive, creative, and innovative in Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security, capable of addressing future technological and industrial challenges.
  2. To enhance research, innovation, and commercialisation in Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security with strategic and integrated approach, to social well-being and technological sustainability.
  3. To foster strong moral, leadership and ethics values among students holistically.
  4. To strengthen smart infrastructure, digital systems, financial governance, and a high-performance work culture that supports sustainability of the faculty.
  5. To uphold the faculty as a globally recognised institution through internationalisation, strategic collaborations, and excellence in academic and research.


#  **Contact Us**
Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security  
Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka  
Hang Tuah Jaya, 76100 Durian Tunggal  
Melaka, Malaysia

#  **Bengkel Fasa 1 : Hala Tuju Strategik FAIX | Makmal UTeM-CySCC**
#  10 Julai 2025 
* * *
Bengkel Hala Tuju Strategik FAIX yang telah diadakan bersama Pengurusan FAIX telah dapat menghasilkan visi, misi dan objektif fakulti buat pertama kalinya, sebagai asas hala tuju strategik yang jelas dalam mendukung pembangunan bidang Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber serta menyokong aspirasi universiti
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/60/bengkel1-60d7d220.jpeg)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fbengkel2.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=9a9214c1)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fbengkel3.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=2f12b86f)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fbengkel4.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=7ccd9a0c)

#  **FAIX Melakar Sejarah**
#  12 Jun 2025 
* * *
Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka - UTeM melalui Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX) mencipta detik bersejarah apabila Perdana Menteri, YAB Dato’ Seri Anwar Ibrahim merasmikan FAIX sempena Sambutan Hari TVET Negara 2025 pada 12 Jun 2025 di MITC Melaka.
Terima kasih kepada Kementerian Pendidikan Tinggi, MTVETrasmi , MOTAC dan semua yang bersama-sama menjadi tulang belakang dan menyaksikan detik bersejarah ini.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/2b/faixTVET2-2bb80f87.jpeg)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FfaixTVET4.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=303a36aa)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FfaixTVET1.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=053eee0a)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FfaixTVET3.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=8a740aba)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FfaixTVET5.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=e7bfc50f)

#  **Guest Lecture Program delivered by Dr Ammar Masood Dean, Faculty of Computing & Artificial Intelligence Director, National Centre of Cyber Securitu AIR University, Islamabad Pakistan**
* * *
Topic : "Cyber Security & Emerging Technologies" Professor Dr. Zunera Jalil Department of Cyber Security Faculty of Comuting & Artificial Intelligence AIR University, Islamabad Pakistan Topic : "The Reciprocal Relation between AI & Digital Forensics" Date: Friday, 4 July 2025 TM Time: 9:30 am – 11.30 am Venue: Recap Room, FTMK This program highlights the latest developments in AI and cybersecurity by international experts and provides a platform to: Enhance strategic knowledge Expanding the professional network. Strengthening the culture of science at UTeM.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/ff/talk1-ffecab75.jpeg)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Ftalk2.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=2a0e3d23)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Ftalk3.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=f075fa81)

#  **Keratan Akhbar - Sesi Lawatan dan Menandatangani Memorandum Persefahaman (MoU) antara UTeM dan PACE Institute of Technology and Sciences, India**
#  13 Mei 2025 
* * *
Sesi menandatangani Memorandum Persefahaman (MoU) antara Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka - UTeM dan PACE Institute of Technology and Sciences, India yang berlangsung baru-baru ini telah mendapat sorotan meluas di dada media India.
Kejayaan ini sekali gus mencerminkan pengiktirafan terhadap usaha berterusan UTeM dalam memperkukuh kerjasama antarabangsa, khususnya dalam bidang kecerdasan buatan dan keselamatan siber.
Setinggi-tinggi tahniah diucapkan kepada Naib Canselor UTeM, Prof. Datuk Ts. Dr. Massila Binti Kamalrudin, Dekan FAIX, Prof. Madya Ts. Dr. Muhammad Hafidz Fazli serta seluruh warga FAIX yang telah memainkan peranan penting dalam merealisasikan sesi lawatan dan pemeteraian MoU ini.
Semoga usaha murni ini menjadi pemangkin kepada lebih banyak kerjasama strategik bertaraf global pada masa akan datang.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FberitaPACE2.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=0170cc50)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FberitaPACE3.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=dfdbe161)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FberitaPACE1.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=030b0e56)
[ News & Activities Gallery ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/news-activities.html)

#  **Jabil Early Career Programs (ECP) Bootcamp 2.0 2025**
* * *
It’s a wrap to the Jabil Early Career Programs (ECP) Bootcamp 2.0 2025 , held on the recent 17th and 18th June at Jabil Plant 1, Penang !
This widely requested second edition bootcamp was specially crafted for students to:  
-Absorb knowledge on the latest industry trends  
-Create new initiatives and concepts  
-Evolve into greater versions of themselves
All while cooking it up to become the absolute 𝗔𝗖𝗘 over two intensive, value-packed days!
Proudly representing UTeM, four of our outstanding FAIX's students from Bachelor of Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence) :  
1. Chan Kar Wai  
2. Goh Kai Yang  
3. Law Zin Chen  
4. Cheah Chee Foong
They took part in this prestigious program—gaining firsthand exposure to real-world industry insights, networking with professionals, and sharpening their innovative thinking alongside peers from across Malaysia. A remarkable experience and an inspiring step forward in their early career journey!
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fecp1.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=e6bf88b1)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fecp2.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=f515f916)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/05/ecp3-05dc6698.jpeg)

#  **Kerjasama Power! FAIX Heitech Padu**
#  24 -25 Julai 2015 
* * *
FAIX UTeM dan Heitech Padu telah menganjurkan Bengkel Kerjasama Makmal Industri
Dirasmikan oleh YBrs. Prof. Madya Ts. Dr. Muhammad Hafidz Fazli, Dekan FAIX, bengkel ini menghimpunkan pensyarah Jabatan Keselamatan Siber & Kecerdasan Buatan bagi membincangkan:
  * Pemantapan kemahiran staf & pelajar TVET
  * Kolaborasi industri dalam bidang Cybersecurity & AI
  * Penubuhan makmal industri bersama


Terima kasih buat Heitech Padu atas peluang kolaborasi strategik ini. FAIX komited untuk terus melahirkan bakat digital yang bersedia ke industri!
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FbengkelHeitech2.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=e66bf107)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FbengkelHeitech1.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=7e7051c5)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/65/bengkelHeitech3-65835d3f.jpeg)

#  **Kunjungan Hormat daripada Delegasi German-Malaysian Institute (GMI)**
#  17 April 2025 
* * *
Pada 17 April 2025, Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX), Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka (UTeM) telah menerima kunjungan hormat daripada delegasi German-Malaysian Institute (GMI). Lawatan ini bertujuan untuk membincangkan kerjasama strategik ke arah pelaksanaan program pengajian peringkat ijazah antara kedua-dua institusi.
Sebagai makluman, hubungan kerjasama antara GMI dan UTeM telah terjalin sejak 7 Februari 2023, merangkumi bidang pengkomputeran, penerbitan dan penulisan akademik, serta latihan berkaitan Capture The Flag (CTF).
Melalui sesi ini, kedua-dua pihak berkesempatan untuk menilai potensi perluasan kerjasama sedia ada ke arah yang lebih holistik. Diharapkan usaha ini akan melahirkan inisiatif bersama yang berdaya tahan serta menyumbang kepada kecemerlangan akademik, pembangunan profesional, dan pengukuhan reputasi institusi di peringkat kebangsaan dan antarabangsa.
Perbincangan tersebut dipimpin oleh:   
Dr. Siti Azirah Binti Asmai, Timbalan Dekan Akademik, (FAIX) dan Ts. Fahrul Rizal bin A. Halim, Penolong Pengarah Urusan Akademik & Operasi, (GMI).
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/d8/GMI1-d8daa2b4.jpeg)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FGMI2.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=42e2b0d2)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FGMI3.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=abc16375)

#  **Lawatan Delegasi Kementerian Pendidikan, Sains Dan Inovasi Uzbekistan KE Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka - UTeM**
#  Khamis | 17 April 2025 
* * *
UTeM telah menerima kunjungan hormat daripada delegasi Kementerian Pendidikan, Sains dan Inovasi Uzbekistan yang diketuai oleh Mr. Jonibek Tavakalov, Executive Director of the Fund for Science Financing and Innovation Support (INNOFUND).
Turut hadir dalam lawatan ini ialah:
  1. Mr. Imamov Shukhrat – Chief Specialist
  2. Mr. Elyor Kabulov – Chief, Department
  3. Mr. Botir Kamalov – Chief, Department
  4. Mdm. Feruza Mamatova – Researcher  
Ministry of Higher Education, Science, and Innovation, Uzbekistan


Lawatan kerja ini menjadi platform perbincangan awal bagi meneroka potensi kerjasama strategik dalam bidang pendidikan tinggi, penyelidikan dan inovasi antara Uzbekistan dan UTeM.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/1d/uzbek1-1d9dbbb7.jpeg)

![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fuzbek3.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=82f4f0b6)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fuzbek4.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=236c8080)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fuzbek5.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=fd954c41)

#  **Lawatan Kerja daripada Polis Diraja Malaysia (PDRM)**
#  Selasa | 20 Mei 2025 
* * *
Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX) telah menerima kunjungan kerja daripada Polis Diraja Malaysia (PDRM) sebagai sebahagian daripada usaha memperluas jaringan kerjasama strategik yang memfokuskan kepada bidang penyelidikan dan akademik.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/f9/pdrm1-f96e0803.jpeg)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fpdrm2.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=02dc79bc)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fpdrm3.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=4076e2e0)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fpdrm4.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=acdec41f)
[ News & Activities Gallery ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/news-activities.html)

#  **Sesi Lawatan dan Perbincangan FAIX bersama C-DAC, India**
#  Isnin | 5 Mei 2025 
* * *
Lawatan kerja ini bertujuan untuk mendapatkan pendedahan dan pengalaman secara langsung berkaitan strategi serta pelaksanaan infrastruktur Kecerdasan Buatan (AI) berskala besar, khususnya melibatkan penggunaan sistem berprestasi tinggi seperti NVIDIA DGX di Data Intensive Computing Centre (DICC), Universiti Malaya.
Sebagai hasil daripada lawatan ini, dicadangkan agar satu dokumen Pelan Strategi Infrastruktur AI FAIX-UTeM bagi tempoh tiga hingga lima tahun dibangunkan. Pelan ini berpotensi untuk merangkumi keperluan dari segi perkakasan, perisian, sumber manusia, serta anggaran peruntukan kewangan. Turut dicadangkan agar pelan ini mengandungi cadangan pelaksanaan secara berfasa, dengan penekanan terhadap penggunaan sistem pengkomputeran berprestasi tinggi seperti NVIDIA DGX.
Hasil lain yang diharapkan termasuklah:
  * Terjalinnya hubungan strategik antara UTeM dan UM dalam bidang pembangunan AI;
  * Peluang kerjasama penyelidikan dan perkongsian kepakaran;
  * Penyediaan senarai tindakan susulan seperti program latihan, lawatan teknikal lanjutan, dan penyediaan kertas kerja untuk permohonan dana pembangunan infrastruktur AI di FAIX.


![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FUM1.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=c00629ae)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/80/UM2-80414a7f.jpeg)

#  Lawatan Kerjasama Strategik CIMA ke Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX), Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka - UTeM 
#  26 Jun 2025 
* * *
FAIX menerima kunjungan strategik daripada pihak CIMA (Cement Industries of Malaysia Berhad) bagi membincangkan peluang kerjasama di bawah inisiatif TVET Berimpak Tinggi sebagai usaha bersama untuk memperkasa pembangunan modal insan negara melalui perlaksanaan program latihan yang relevan, bersesuaian dengan keperluan industri semasa melalui teknologi, data dan keselamatan siber.
Turut dibincangkan adalah berkaitan penyelesaian masalah industri, khususnya dalam predictive maintenance, peluang mendapatkan pensijilan profesional, Maklumat berhubung geran padanan dan Penempatan bagi pelajar latihan industri.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FCIMA1.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=31f55e6a)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FCIMA2.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=55223aeb)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/37/CIMA3-377f2ef4.jpeg)

#  **Majlis Akademik Fakulti (MAF) FAIX Bil.1/2025**
#  Rabu | 26 Mac 2025 
* * *
FAIX telah menerima kunjungan Dr Sudarsan dan Dr Misbahuddin daripada C-DAC, India.
Sesi lawatan ke makmal dijalankan pada sebelah pagi manakala sesi perbincangan yang dipengerusikan oleh YBhg. Prof. Dr. Zulkifilie Bin Ibrahim, TNCAA telah dijalankan pada sebelah petang.
Lawatan dan perbincangan antara kedua-dua pihak bertujuan untuk mengukuhkan kerjasama dalam penyelidikan, inovasi, dan pembangunan teknologi, serta meneroka peluang-peluang baru dalam bidang tersebut.
Potensi terjalinnya MoU akan memperkukuh kerjasama dalam penyelidikan dan inovasi, dengan fokus kepada pemindahan teknologi yang lebih efektif dan pengembangan penyelesaian teknologi yang lebih maju untuk kedua-dua pihak.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/22/maf1-223cf227.jpeg)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fmaf2.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=877b4185)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fmaf3.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=524806ce)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fmaf4.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=4e292e95)

#  **Majlis Anugerah Dekan FAIX dan FTMK**
#  14 Jun 2025 
* * *
Tahniah kepada semua penerima Sijil Anugerah Dekan Bagi Pelajar Semester 1 Sesi 2024 / 2025
BITI - IJAZAH SARJANA MUDA SAINS KOMPUTER  
(KEPINTARAN BUATAN) DENGAN KEPUJIAN (169 Penerima)
BITZ - IJAZAH SARJANA MUDA SAINS KOMPUTER  
(KESELAMATAN KOMPUTER) DENGAN KEPUJIAN (171 Penerima)
"Sebagai pelajar FAIX, anda berada dalam posisi yang sangat strategik. Bidang yang anda ceburi bukan sahaja berteknologi tinggi, tetapi juga berimpak besar kepada masyarakat, industri dan negara. Maka, saya menyeru agar anda terus melengkapkan diri dengan ilmu, nilai integriti, semangat inovatif, serta kepekaan terhadap isu-isu etika dan keselamatan dalam teknologi. Anda bukan sekadar pengguna teknologi, tetapi pencipta dan penjaga masa depan digital negara." - Prof. Madya Ts. Dr. Muhammad Hafidz Fazli Bin Md Fauadi, Dekan, Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FAnugerahDekan.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=f00818d7)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/3e/AnugerahDekan2-3e554b26.jpeg)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FAnugerahDekan3.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=32695636)

#  **Majlis Menandatangani Letter of Intent (LoI)**
* * *
[Perkongsian Kejayaan FAIX UTeM]
Alhamdulillah, hari ini telah berlangsung Majlis Menandatangani Letter of Intent (LoI) antara:
Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX), UTeM  
diwakili oleh Associate Professor Ts. Dr. Muhammad Hafidz Fazli Bin Md Fauadi, Dekan FAIX  
dan
Faculty of Computing & Artificial Intelligence, Air University, Pakistan  
diwakili oleh Dr. Ammar Masood, Dekan dan Pengarah National Centre of Cyber Security, Air University
LoI ini menjadi pemangkin strategik dalam usaha memperkukuh kerjasama akademik dan penyelidikan merentas sempadan, meliputi:
-Pertukaran pelajar, pensyarah, dan penyelidik  
-Pelaksanaan penyelidikan bersama serta penerbitan berimpak tinggi  
-Pemindahan ilmu dan teknologi terkini  
-Pengukuhan mobiliti akademik antarabangsa
"Bersama memacu kecemerlangan AI dan keselamatan siber untuk membina dunia yang lebih pintar, selamat, dan berdaya tahan."
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/02/talk4-02cf382b.jpeg)
###  Talk 4 
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Ftalk6.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=8dcc009b)
###  Talk 6 
[ News & Activities Gallery ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/news-activities.html)

#  **Majlis Pertukaran Memorandum Persefahaman (MoU) antara NACSA dan UTeM di CYDES 2025**
#  Jumaat | 14 Mac 2025 
* * *
Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka - UTeM melalui Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIx) hari ini telah memeterai Memorandum Persefahaman bersama Agensi Keselamatan Siber Negara (NACSA) dalam satu majlis yang berlangsung di CYDES 2025.
Kerjasama strategik ini bertujuan untuk:
  * Melahirkan generasi celik siber melalui pendidikan berteraskan TVET
  * Memperkasa pembangunan kapasiti dan pensijilan profesional dalam keselamatan siber
  * Menggiatkan penyelidikan bersama dalam bidang keselamatan siber
  * Meningkatkan pemindahan teknologi dan perkongsian pengetahuan
  * Mengukuhkan jaringan kepakaran antara industri dan academia


Majlis bersejarah ini telah dirasmikan oleh Timbalan Perdana Menteri, YAB Dato' Seri Dr. Ahmad Zahid Hamidi dan disempurnakan dengan kehadiran Yang Berbahagia Naib Canselor UTeM, Dekan FAIx, serta barisan pengurusan dan staf akademik fakulti. UTeM yakin bahawa kerjasama sebegini akan membuka ruang lebih luas dalam memperkukuh ekosistem keselamatan siber negara, sekaligus melahirkan graduan yang kompeten, berdaya saing, dan bersedia menghadapi cabaran era digital.

#  **Tahniah Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka - UTeM**
* * *
Satu memorandum persefahaman telah dimeterai antara Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka dan Guangxi Minzu University, China pada 15 April 2025.
Prof. Dr. Wei Shizhen, mewakili Guangxi Minzu University dan Prof. Datuk Ts. Dr. Massila Binti Kamalrudin mewakili Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka.
Kedua-dua universiti bersetuju menubuhkan Makmal AI Bersama melibatkan:
  1. Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber, UTeM.
  2. School of Artificial Intelligence, GXMZU.
  3. School of Information Engineering, GXMZU.


Selain itu, kerjasama juga ditumpukan dalam bidang keselamatan siber, bioteknologi, maklumat elektronik, logistik rantaian bekalan, persekitaran marin.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FGuangxi.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=98713383)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/f8/Guangxi2-f89eb3ec.jpeg)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FGuangxi3.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=a182fa01)
[ News & Activities Gallery ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/news-activities.html)

#  **Mesyuarat Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX) Bersama HiTech Padu**
#  Rabu | 12 Mac 2025 
* * *
Mesyuarat antara Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX) UTeM dan HiTech Padu Berhad bertujuan untuk membincangkan pelbagai kerjasama serta peluang-peluang yang boleh dijalankan antara kedua-dua pihak. Perbincangan ini akan membuka ruang bagi mengenal pasti bentuk kerjasama yang boleh memberi manfaat bersama dalam bidang kecerdasan buatan dan keselamatan siber. Salah satu impak utama daripada mesyuarat ini adalah peluang untuk mengadakan MoU antara FAIX dan HiTech Padu Berhad, yang akan memperkukuh hubungan kedua-dua pihak dan memberikan asas yang lebih kukuh untuk kolaborasi dalam bidang teknologi dan penyelidikan.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fcyber1.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=d93471a7)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/eb/cyber2-eb80913a.jpeg)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fcyber3.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=f00277e8)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fcyber4.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=800db337)

#  **Mesyuarat Pelarasan Sambutan Hari TVET Negara 2025 bersama Timbalan Perdana Menteri, YAB Dato' Seri Dr. Ahmad Zahid Hamidi**
#  Selasa | 10 Jun 2025 
* * *
Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka - UTeM telah diberikan penghormatan untuk melaksanakan Peluncuran Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX) semasa Majlis Perasmian Hari TVET Negara, yang akan disempurnakan oleh YAB Perdana Menteri pada 12 Jun 2025.
Penubuhan FAIX ini merupakan sebahagian daripada agenda strategik Kementerian Pengajian Tinggi (KPT) dalam menyokong aspirasi TVET negara. FAIX juga merupakan manifestasi komitmen KPT terhadap kerangka Kecerdasan Buatan Negara yang telah diumumkan oleh YAB Perdana Menteri, sekaligus memperlihatkan kesiapsiagaan KPT dalam menyahut cabaran era teknologi masa kini.
Semoga Urusan Pelancuran Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan Dan Keselamatan Siber dipermudahkan
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FmeetingTVET1.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=77e9ebff)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FmeetingTVET2.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=b66441a1)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2FmeetingTVET3.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=f5bc5d78)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/94/meetingTVET4-9435297f.jpeg)
[ News & Activities Gallery ](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/news-activities.html)

#  **Pelajar Latihan Industri**
* * *
Pihak Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX) merakamkan setinggi-tinggi penghargaan dan ucapan terima kasih kepada Nur Dania Zulaikha Binti  
Azmi atas sumbangan dan komitmen sepanjang tempoh latihan industri di fakulti ini.
Sebagai pelajar intern pertama di FAIX, Usaha, dedikasi dan kesediaan untuk belajar amat dihargai dan kami percaya pengalaman ini akan memberi nilai tambah dalam perjalanan kerjayanya kelak.
Semoga segala ilmu dan pengalaman yang diperoleh di FAIX akan menjadi bekalan yang berguna untuk masa depan. Kami mendoakan kejayaan yang berterusan dalam akademik dan apa jua bidang yang diceburi selepas ini.
Sekali lagi, jutaan terima kasih daripada seluruh warga FAIX. Selamat maju jaya!

#  **Perbincangan Strategik FAIX Bersama Kementarian Kerja Raya, Pembangunan Sistem Analitik Data Raya**
#  24 Julai 2025 
* * *
FAIX telah menerima kunjungan Dr Sudarsan dan Dr Misbahuddin daripada C-DAC, India.
Sesi lawatan ke makmal dijalankan pada sebelah pagi manakala sesi perbincangan yang dipengerusikan oleh YBhg. Prof. Dr. Zulkifilie Bin Ibrahim, TNCAA telah dijalankan pada sebelah petang.
Lawatan dan perbincangan antara kedua-dua pihak bertujuan untuk mengukuhkan kerjasama dalam penyelidikan, inovasi, dan pembangunan teknologi, serta meneroka peluang-peluang baru dalam bidang tersebut.
Potensi terjalinnya MoU akan memperkukuh kerjasama dalam penyelidikan dan inovasi, dengan fokus kepada pemindahan teknologi yang lebih efektif dan pengembangan penyelesaian teknologi yang lebih maju untuk kedua-dua pihak.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/c3/kerjaRaya1-c36e7eca.jpeg)

#  **Program Kembara Kesedaran Pendidikan Anak Desa Madani (KeDESA)**
#  17 Jun 2025 
* * *
Skuad Promo UTeM telah berada Program Kembara Kesedaran Pendidikan Anak Desa MADANI (KeDESA) di Dewan SuArmada Utama, Politeknik, Bagan Datuk, Perak menyampaikan perkongsian maklumat berkaitan laluan kerjaya dan peluang menyambung pengajian di UTeM.
Program ini adalah merupakan program anjuran Gerakan Pendidikan Bumiputera Malaysia (GPBM. Kembara Kesedaran Pendidikan Anak Desa Madani (KeDESA) DIDIK MADANI
Tahun 2025 dan akan dimulakan di Negeri Perak. Program ini memfokuskan kepada 4M iaitu Mencari Pelajar, Mengenal Pelajar, Memberi Kesedaran dan Membantu Pelajar lepasan SPM dan STPM yang tercicir dari seluruh negara untuk menyambung pengajian ke peringkat yang lebih tinggi. Selain itu juga, program ini mensasarkan untuk memberi kesedaran kepada pelajar Tingkatan 5 dan Tingkatan 6 supaya mereka dapat memilih bidang yang bersesuaian dengan minat dan pasaran kerja masa kini. GPBM juga mensasarkan 10,000 orang pelajar yang kurang berkemampuan terutama di luar bandar, pendalaman dan miskin bandar yang akan dibimbing untuk menyambung pelajaran ke peringkat lebih tinggi.
Program dirasmikan oleh Timbalan Perdana Menteri YAB Dato’ Seri Dr. Ahmad Zahid Hamidi.
Taklimat telah disampaikan Ts. Dr. Abdul Syukor Bin Mohamad Jaya, Pensyarah Kanan Dari Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan Dan Keselamatan Siber

#  **Program Master of Technology in Data Science and Analytics (MAXL) @ UTeM**
#  Sabtu | 22 Mac 2025 
* * *
Alhamdulillah, pencapaian bermakna buat kami di UTeM dan Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX) apabila secara rasmi menyambut kohort pertama pelajar Master of Technology in Data Science and Analytics (MAXL).
Selamat datang dan tahniah kepada Theviya Darshini Ponniah dan Mohd Azrin Bin Ibrahim kerana menjadi perintis dalam program MAXL, yang ditawarkan secara Open and Distance Learning (ODL). Terima kasih tidak terhingga kepada pasukan akademik dari Jabatan Pengkomputeran Pintar dan Analitik (ICA), FTMK UTeM serta Institute of Technology Management And Entrepreneurship - IPTK UTeM. Saya amat berbesar hati kerana dapat melaksanakan pembangunan program ini bersama pasukan hebat dan komited dari tiada pengetahuan berkenaan ODL hingga ditawarkan program.
Pagi tadi, kami turut mengadakan sesi taklimat kepada pelajar-pelajar kami. Taklimat FAIX telah disampaikan oleh Assoc. Prof. Ts. Dr. Muhammad Hafidz Fazli bin Md Fauadi, Dekan FAIX, diikuti dengan pengenalan MAXL oleh Assoc. Prof. Dr. Zuraida Abal AbasTimbalan Dekan Pascasiswazah dan Penyelidikan, serta Dr. Halizah Basiron, Ketua Program. Turut memberikan taklimat adalah Assoc. Prof. IR. Ts. Dr. Jeefferie bin Abd Razak, Timbalan Dekan Sps UTeM.
Program ini bukan sekadar program akdemik tetapi satu usaha kami di FAIX untuk melahirkan lebih ramai pemimpin dalam sains data dan analitik di negara kita.  
Selamat datang ke MAXL dan selamat datang ke Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan Dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX), UTeM

#  **Sesi Lawatan dan Menandatangani Memorandum Persefahaman (MoU) antara UTeM dan PACE Institute of Technology and Sciences, India**
#  Isnin | 5 Mei 2025 
* * *
FAIX, UTeM telah menerima kunjungan hormat daripada PACE yang diketuai oleh Dr. Sridhar Maddisetty, Secretary & Correspondent, serta Dr. G.V.K. Murthy, Principal.
Delegasi telah dibawa melawat ke makmal CyScc (Cyber Security) dijalankan pada sebelah pagi bagi meninjau kemudahan dan kepakaran penyelidikan yang ditawarkan oleh UTeM.   
Manakala sesi menandatangi MoU berlangsung pada sebelah petang yang disempurnakan oleh Prof. Datuk Ts. Dr. Massila Binti Kamalrudin, Naib Canselor UTeM.
Diharap MoU ini akan menjadi pemangkin kepada hubungan yang lebih erat dan berimpak tinggi antara kedua-dua institusi, selaras dengan aspirasi UTeM untuk terus unggul sebagai institusi pendidikan tinggi teknikal yang progresif, inklusif dan bertaraf global.

#  **Sesi Lawatan dan Perbincangan FAIX bersama C-DAC, India**
#  Jumaat | 14 Mac 2025 
* * *
FAIX telah menerima kunjungan Dr Sudarsan dan Dr Misbahuddin daripada C-DAC, India.
Sesi lawatan ke makmal dijalankan pada sebelah pagi manakala sesi perbincangan yang dipengerusikan oleh YBhg. Prof. Dr. Zulkifilie Bin Ibrahim, TNCAA telah dijalankan pada sebelah petang.
Lawatan dan perbincangan antara kedua-dua pihak bertujuan untuk mengukuhkan kerjasama dalam penyelidikan, inovasi, dan pembangunan teknologi, serta meneroka peluang-peluang baru dalam bidang tersebut.
Potensi terjalinnya MoU akan memperkukuh kerjasama dalam penyelidikan dan inovasi, dengan fokus kepada pemindahan teknologi yang lebih efektif dan pengembangan penyelesaian teknologi yang lebih maju untuk kedua-dua pihak.

#  **Taklimat Persediaan Program Pertama ODL FAIX (MAXL) -Sem 2 2024/2025**
#  Khamis | 13 Mac 2025 
* * *
Mesyuarat antara Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX) UTeM dan HiTech Padu Berhad bertujuan untuk membincangkan pelbagai kerjasama serta peluang-peluang yang boleh dijalankan antara kedua-dua pihak. Perbincangan ini akan membuka ruang bagi mengenal pasti bentuk kerjasama yang boleh memberi manfaat bersama dalam bidang kecerdasan buatan dan keselamatan siber. Salah satu impak utama daripada mesyuarat ini adalah peluang untuk mengadakan MoU antara FAIX dan HiTech Padu Berhad, yang akan memperkukuh hubungan kedua-dua pihak dan memberikan asas yang lebih kukuh untuk kolaborasi dalam bidang teknologi dan penyelidikan.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/45/odl1-4545b658.jpeg)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/89/odl2-898cb2e9.jpeg)
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/en/component/ajax/?p=image&src=%7B%22file%22%3A%22images%2Factivity%2Fodl3.jpg%22%2C%22thumbnail%22%3A%22%2C%2C%22%7D&hash=5626d7f5)
#  **Contact Us**
Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security  
Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka  
Hang Tuah Jaya, 76100 Durian Tunggal  
Melaka, Malaysia

  * +606 229 2124


Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security (FAIX)

#  **Undangan Kementerian Digital**
* * *
Fakulti Kecerdasan Buatan dan Keselamatan Siber (FAIX), UTeM menerima undangan Kementerian Digital dalam membincangkan agenda bagi memacu pembangunan AI dan Keselamatan Siber di Malaysia.  
Prof. Madya Ts Dr Muhammad Hafidz Fazli Bin Md Fauadi, Dekan FAIX bersama pakar-pakar AI institusi pengajian tinggi lain diberi peluang menghadiri sesi konsultasi bersama YB Gobind Singh Deo berkaitan Pelan Tindakan AI 2030. Antara perkara yang diutarakan termasuk keperluan infrastruktur pendidikan dan penyelidikan yang kompetitif serta pendekatan pembangunan modal insan secara komprehensif.
![](https://faix.utem.edu.my/templates/yootheme/cache/d1/kementerian-d1221099.jpeg)
###  Kementerian

#  Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security (FAIX) 
The establishment of the Faculty of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security (FAIX) marks a significant milestone for Universiti Teknikal Malaysia Melaka (UTeM) as it steps boldly into the forefront of education and research within Malaysia's Technical University Network (MTUN) and on a national scale. Officially founded on July 22, 2024, FAIX embodies UTeM’s proactive approach to addressing the evolving demands of technology and higher education, all while aligning with the vision and aspirations set forth by the Ministry of Higher Education.
Under the esteemed leadership of Vice-Chancellor, Professor Datuk Ts Dr. Massila Kamalrudin, UTeM is committed to becoming a primary driver in producing a workforce equipped with the necessary skills to meet the country’s ambitious goal of cultivating 200,000 AI specialists and 100,000 cyber security experts by 2030. This endeavor underscores Malaysia's aspiration to emerge as a regional technology leader, capable of competing within the global digital landscape.
FAIX is strategically designed to combine the core elements of Artificial Intelligence and Cyber Security, which are not only relevant but critical to modern society and industries worldwide.
